title: Berkian Cattle
description: Resource Pack intended for use alongside Dragon mods (ETF/EMF REQUIRED)
body:
**(Requires ETF and EMF)**
**If your animals look like their vanilla model with a wrong texture slapped onto them, you've likely not installed Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features. You kinda need that.**

Restyles minecraft's livestock to resemble those from the barbaric archipelago!

Can be used standalone, but created with Isle of Berk and Berk's new dawn in mind.
